title: Mission to Lianna

"'''''Mission to Lianna'''''" is a paperback supplement to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]]. It was written by [[Joanne E. Wyrick]] and published in [[April]] [[1992]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''A weary Rebel unit, after completing a mundane mission, discovers a top-secret Imperial operation intent on producing an effective cloaking device for their starships.''

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|adventure}}

==Continuity==
The cover picture of ''Mission to Lianna'' is in fact a concept illustration for the planet [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] realized by [[Ralph McQuarrie]] for the [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="TISWU">''[[The Illustrated Star Wars Universe]]''</ref>
